hooks.command: H=$(command -v shasum >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'shasum -a 256' || echo 'sha256sum'); REPO_ID=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null | $H | cut -d' ' -f1 | head -c 12); CURRENT_HASH=$( (git diff HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -z 2>/dev/null | sort -z | xargs -0 -r sh -c 'for f; do printf "\0%s\0" "$f"; cat "$f"; done' _) | $H | cut -d' ' -f1); if [ -n "$CURRENT_HASH" ] && [ "$CURRENT_HASH" != "e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855" ]; then LAST_HASH=$(cat "/tmp/.codex-last-reviewed-hash-${REPO_ID}" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$CURRENT_HASH" != "$LAST_HASH" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Code changes detected since last Codex review. Run the codex-review-code skill to review these changes."}'; fi; fi
